## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New provider
- [ ] Provider method coverage
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Security hardening

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit secrets, tokens, assertions, customer data, or live payment data.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed.
- [ ] I updated docs when public usage changed.
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes.
- [ ] `bun run test` passes.
- [ ] `bun run build` passes.
